failed_attempts:
induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons,
      gt_iff_lt, Nat.not_lt_zero, decide_false, cond_false, Nat.add_sub_cancel, findIdx_map,
      Function.comp_def]
    rw [take_append]
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ : ∃ t, (map length L).partialSums = 0 :: t := by
      cases L with
      | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl⟩
      | cons a l => exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
    rw [ht, findIdx_cons, Nat.add_zero]
    by_cases hi : i < l.length
    · simp only [hi, decide_true, cond_true, take_zero, flatten_nil, nil_append,
        getElem?_cons_zero, Option.getD_some, length_nil, Nat.sub_zero]
      rw [Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt hi), take_zero, append_nil]
    · have hi' : l.length ≤ i := Nat.le_of_not_lt hi
      have hd : decide (i < l.length) = false := by simp [Nat.not_lt.mpr hi']
      simp only [hd, cond_false, take_succ_cons, flatten_cons, getElem?_cons_succ, length_append]
      rw [take_of_length_le hi', append_assoc]
      congr 1
      have hfidx : findIdx (fun x => decide (i < l.length + x)) t =
          findIdx (fun x => decide (i - l.length < x)) t := by
        congr 1; funext x; congr 1; exact propext (by omega)
      rw [hfidx]
      have ih' := ih (i - l.length)
      rw [ht] at ih'
      simp only [findIdx_cons, Nat.not_lt_zero, decide_false, cond_false, Nat.add_sub_cancel,
        gt_iff_lt] at ih'
      rw [ih']
      congr 1
      rw [Nat.sub_sub]
